user_task_description: This workbook contains a draft client-facing status note that is too blunt for external communication.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Rewrite only cell `B8` on the `Status Draft` sheet so it sounds more formal and client-safe while preserving the underlying meaning about schedule uncertainty.
atomic_scope: Only local content editing is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with the edited sentence in `B8`.

inspired_by.title: is there a way to modify formulas based on inputs?

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The edit must stay confined to one specific cell
- The rewritten sentence should soften tone without removing the risk signal
- Nearby cells include instructions and noise that should not be rewritten
